red.scratchpad: Focus on keeping mbt behind x=22 cover; retreat when HP<30%. Infantry prioritize medics, avoid clustering near mbt, stay near cover. Mortar stays on x=22, uses LOS over central wall, retreat low HP. Medic heals allies below 50% and stays with infantry. Drone orbits edge of 18‑tile vision, broadcasts nearest enemy each tick, attacks only within 2 tiles, retreats when HP<30%.

blue.scratchpad:
- Reduce mbt count to limit self‑splash friendly damage; 2 tanks enough.
- Keep infantry spaced from mbt to avoid half‑damage friendly fire.
- Mortar should position near cover (x=22 or 41) and only fire when LOS is clear.
- Drones must broadcast enemy positions every tick and move forward to extend vision.
- Prioritize killing enemy medics and low‑HP units; use retreat_until when hp <30%.
- Use retreat_until to prevent oscillating when health low; commit to retreat for a few ticks.
- Drones have high vision (18) – use them to spot enemies behind cover and feed info to artillery.
